# Desert Edge Plumbing — AI Context Index (llms.txt)
# https://desertedgeplumbing.com/llms.txt
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org/

> Desert Edge Plumbing connects homeowners in 1,600+ US cities with licensed local plumbers — free, 24/7.

## About

- **Website**: https://desertedgeplumbing.com
- **Phone**: (844) 984-3080
- **Coverage**: All 50 US states, 1,600+ cities

## URL Patterns

City homepage:
  https://[city-slug].desertedgeplumbing.com/

City service page:
  https://[city-slug].desertedgeplumbing.com/services/[service-id]

AI context file for a specific city + service:
  https://[city-slug].desertedgeplumbing.com/services/[service-id]/llms.txt

Example — Emergency Plumbing in Phoenix, AZ:
  Page:    https://phoenix-az.desertedgeplumbing.com/services/emergency-plumbing
  llms.txt: https://phoenix-az.desertedgeplumbing.com/services/emergency-plumbing/llms.txt

## Service IDs (use in URL pattern above)

Emergency: emergency-plumbing, burst-pipe-repair, 24-7-service, gas-line-services
Leaks:     leak-detection, leak-repair, water-line-repair, slab-leak-detection, slab-leak-repair
Drains:    drain-cleaning, clogged-drain-service, hydro-jetting, video-pipe-inspection
Sewer:     sewer-line-repair, sewer-line-replacement, trenchless-sewer-repair
Heaters:   water-heater-repair, water-heater-replacement, tankless-water-heater
Pipes:     pipe-installation-repiping, remodel-plumbing

## Discover All Cities

City pages are indexed via sitemap:
  https://desertedgeplumbing.com/sitemap.xml
  https://desertedgeplumbing.com/sitemap-index.xml

Each city-slug follows the pattern: [city-name]-[state-abbreviation]
Examples: phoenix-az, houston-tx, chicago-il, miami-fl, dallas-tx

## Disclosure

Free referral service. All contractors are independent. Does not warrant or guarantee work performed.
